get.summary: Get a summary of the project's balances
Get a list of balance transactions (ledger)

post.summary: Request an anticipation of pending balance

post.description:
Initiates a new payment and runs it through the simulation engine.
Use X-PayMock-Rule header to force a specific simulation result.

Creates a new sandbox project and returns the API key.
Store the api_key securely — it will not be shown again in list responses.

get.description:
Returns all available simulation rules with their identifiers and priorities.
Use these identifiers with the X-PayMock-Rule header to force specific outcomes.

post.description:
Convenience endpoint to trigger a payment with a forced rule.
Equivalent to POST /v1/payments with X-PayMock-Rule header.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
